verses.text: Nikhat, Jesuh in biakinntual sungah mite kiangah thu hilhin, Lungdamna Thu genin a om laitakin, siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, leh upate hong paikhawm uh a
Jesuh kiangah, “Kua' thu tawh hih bangin gamta a, kua in thu hong pia ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Jesuh in, “Kei zong thu khat ka hong dong ding hi. Hong gen dih un
Johan' tuiphumna pen Pasian' tung panin thu ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihing tung panin thu ngah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Pasian' tung panin thu ngah hi,” ci lehang, “Bang hangin ama thu umlo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci ding a
“Mihing tung panin a ngah hi,” ci leuleu lehang, Johan pen kamsang taktak hi, ci-in mi khempeuh in um uh ahih manin suang tawh hong denglum ding uh hi, a kici uh hi
Tua ahih manin Johan' tuiphumna pen kua thu tawh hiam, cih thei kei ung, ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hih bangin ka nasepnate kua' thu tawh ka sep hiam cih kei zong kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Leenggah Lo leh A Khote Thugentehna

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in mite kiangah thugentehna khat gen a, “Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, lo khawhlawhte khawhlawh sakin, amah gamdangah pai-in sauveipi a tam hi
Leenggah min hun a tun' ciangin ama ngahzah tangding a va la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte khat a sawl hi. Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in amah na satgawp uh a, khut hawmguakin a ciahsak uh hi
Tua ciangin nasem dang khat sawl leuleu a, lo khawhlawhte in tuapa zong na satgawpin maizumsak gawp uh a, khut hawmguak mahin a ciahsak uh hi
Tua ciangin a thumveina dongin a nasem dang khat mah sawl leuleu a, lo khawhlawhte in amah zong na liamsak gawpin na sawnkhia uh hi
Tua ciangin leenggah loneipa in, ‘Bang cih ding ka hi hiam? Ka it mahmah ka tapa ka sawl ding hi. Amaute in amah na zahtakbawl khading uh hi,’ a ci hi
Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in a tapa a muh uh ciangin khatlekhat in, ‘Hihpa, a gamhluah dingpa ahi hi. Ama gamhluah ding teng i ngahtheihna dingin amah that ni,’ a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute in lo nawlah amah sawnkhia-in a that uh hi. “Tua ahih leh loneipa in hih lo khawhlawhte bang cih ding ahi hiam
Amah hong pai-in hih lo khawhlawhte that ding a, midangte khawhlawhsak ding hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Hih bangin piang kei ta peuhhen,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute enin, “‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho in a gen pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam
Tua suang tungah a kia mi khempeuh kizangawp ding a, mi khatpeuh tungah tua suang a kiat leh zong dengvuigawp ding hi,” a ci hi.

Jesuh in hih thugentehna a gen pen amaute a cihnopna hi, ci-in Thukham hilh siate leh siampi liante in thei uh ahih manin Jesuh manpah nuam uh hi; ahi zongin mihonte kihta uh ahih manin manpah ngamlo uh hi

Tua ahih manin a hunhoih ngakin vil gige uh a, ukna aana a neite' khutsungah Jesuh a aptheihna dingun ama kampau tawh a mat nopna-un, lungsim takpi tawh thudong a va kineihkhem dingin mi pawlkhat thukan dingin a cial uh hi
Hih thukante in Jesuh kiangah, “Sia aw, na thuhilhnate leh na thugente man mahmah hi. Nang in miliante zahtakbawl tuanloin, Pasian' thu a mantakin na hilhna ka thei uh hi
Rom Kumpipa Sisar' tungah siah i piak ding a kilawm mah ahi hiam, kilawmlo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau' ngianbawlna thei ahih manin
“Sum peek khat hong lak dih un. Hih sum tunga om lim leh min kua-a' ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Kumpipa' lim leh min hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tua ahih leh, Kumpipa-a' teng Kumpipa tungah na pia un la, Pasian-a' teng Pasian' tungah na pia un,” a ci hi
Ama kampauna tawh mihon lak panin a matna dingun thu om theilo ahih manin ama thudawn'na hangin lamdangsa-in a om khikhe uh hi.
Tua ciangin, “Thawhkikna omlo hi,” a ci mi pawlkhat Jesuh kiangah hong pai uh a
“Sia aw, Moses in eite-a' dingin ngeina khat hong koihsak a, ‘Mi khat in ta neiloin a zi a sihsan leh, tua a sipa' khang a kizop theihna dingin a naupa in tua meigongnu ten'pih ta hen,’ ci hi
Khatvei, unau pasal sagih om hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta neiloin a si hi
Tua ciangin a naupa in ten'pih a
tua banah a nausawn in ten'pih leuleu hi. Tua bangin a unau sagih dongin ten'pih uh a, ta neilo vive-in a si khin uh hi
A tawpna-ah numei zong hong si hi
A unau sagih mahin hihnu ten'pih ciat khin uh ahih manin thawhkik ni ciangin hih numei pen a kua pen' zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tu huna hih leitung mite in numei leh pasal kiten'na nei uh hi
Ahi zongin sihna panin thokikin a hong tungding hunah a nungta dingin a kilawm mite in kiten'na cihte neilo uh hi
Amaute pen vantung mi tawh kibang uh a, sithei nawnlo uh hi. Sihna panin a thokik khinte ahih manin amaute pen Pasian' tate ahi uh hi
Tua thamloin Moses in zong misite a thawhkikna thu teltakin hong lak hi. Sawlpang kuang thu a genna munah Topa pen, ‘Abraham Pasian, Isaac Pasian, Jakob Pasian,’ ci-in a na gen hi
Amaute khempeuh hing uh ahih manin, Pasian pen mihingte' Pasian hi a, misite' Pasian hilo hi, a cihnopna ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in, “Sia aw, na dawn'na hoih mahmah hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin Saddusi mite in thu a dong ngam nawn kei uh hi.
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in Khrih pen David' suan hi, ci zenzen ahi uh hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh David mahmah in La Bu sungah, ‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen a: Na galte, na khenuai-ah ka koih matengin ka taklamah tu in,’ ci hi
David in Khrih pen, ‘Topa,’ ci ahih manin bang hangin Khrih pen David' suan hi thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Thukham hilh siate Mawhsak

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in mi khempeuh zakin a nungzuite kiangah

“Thukham hilh siate na batkhak lohna dingun kidawm un. Amaute in puantualpi silhnuam uh a, mihon lakah a kizahtak hopih ding deihin, kikhopna innsung leh pawi lakah a om uh ciangin uliante' tutna mun hoihte bekah tunuam uh hi

Meigong numeite tungah nuamtaksa-in, khemin a neihsateng uh laksak uh a, mite in mihoih a sakna ding uh a deihna-un thu saupipi a ngen uh hi. Amau' kineihkhemna tawh kizui-in a gimthuak ding uh lianzaw ding hi,” a ci hi.
